text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's the day Zenno Rob Roy and<n>Sweep Tosho
have been preparing<n>for—the first day of Reading
Week.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I knew it'd be busy, but the central<n>plaza really is
incredibly crowded... I<n>hope I don't get too
nervous and<n>bungle something...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
It's too late to be getting nervous.<n>We've come
this far, so all we can do<n>now is do our very best!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh... You really are amazing, Sweep.<n>You're
always so unflappable...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: What? Even I get butterflieswhenever I try out a spell for the firsttime!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Even genius magical girls mess up<n>sometimes...
But it's like Granny<n>always said...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
To perform magic, you need a<n>homemade wand,
a mysterious spell...<n>and a smidgeon of courage.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Courage...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
The same goes for promoting an<n>event—you
can't let fear stand in your<n>way! You'll never
succeed if you<n>don't try, right?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: This is gonna spread the wonders ofmagic far and wide, so I'm notbacking out! What about you?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I-I... I want to make this a success<n>too! I want to
share the stories I love<n>so dearly!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
A smidgeon of courage... Even I can<n>manage
that!

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text: What's their deal? Look at their<n>outfits.

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, they're promoting<n>Reading Week. I
wonder if it's gonna<n>be different from last year.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: (There are even more people here<n>than before...)

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
(...But I can't let fear stand in my<n>way! I've got
to be brave and push on<n>ahead! Isn't that right,
Sweep?)

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With the success of Reading Week<n>hanging in
the balance, the first page<n>of a new story is
turned.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It is the story of a cowardly girl who<n>must
venture out to find a witch<n>capable of undoing the
curse that<n>turned her friend into a frog.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: ...It can't be. Is that really true?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
It is. Only a true hero can use the<n>curse-breaking
magic. If anyone else<n>recites the spell, they'll
turn into a frog<n>themselves!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
(She's a cowardly girl, just like me...<n>And when I
needed courage back<n>then, I found it in her
words.)

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
(She was afraid too, but she wanted<n>her dream
to come true. And this is<n>what she said...)

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I'm no hero... I'm just a scaredy-cat.<n>But all the
same...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
You need courage to make your<n>dreams come
true! I'm going to pull<n>this off so I can protect the
people<n>who are important to me!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Twinkle, twinkle, little star! ☆ Return to<n>how you
really are!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Her voice echoes out firmly, full of<n>determination.
Without a moment's<n>delay, I hit the music and, in
the role of<n>the friend, step into the story.
choice_data_list: Thank you so much! You changed me back!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: It worked! Even though I'm not a<n>hero...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You set out on a journey to save a<n>beloved
friend and recited the spell<n>without flinching in the
face of danger.<n>You're no scaredy-cat. You're a
true<n>hero.

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: (Woooo!)

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Thank you all for staying to watch!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
The library staff are holding an<n>exhibition in the
A/V room, where<n>wonderful stories await!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I hope... from the bottom of my heart...<n>that this
experience helps you fall in<n>love with the world
of fiction!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey, why don't we go take a<n>look at the
exhibition?

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Yeah, it sounds kinda fun this year!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And with that, the event promotion<n>finishes. As
for the exhibition itself...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Yep, nothing does the trick like a<n>fantasy booth. ♪
Did you see their<n>faces when we charmed them
with<n>magic?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Bravo, brave heroes. I saw your<n>performance in
the central plaza.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Each story was so captivating... My<n>friend is
delighted as well...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: R-really?! That's great!

text_block_list.name: Exhibition Attendee
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me! I was wondering if you<n>could tell me
about this story in more<n>detail.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Oh... It's Rob Roy...
choice_data_list: Why don't you go help her?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: R-right! With pleasure!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
(Okay, be brave and tell her all about<n>it... It's a
book you love, and want<n>everyone else to love
too... The tale of<n>Rob Roy!)

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: The first day of Reading Week is a<n>success.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And seeing Zenno Rob Roy proudly<n>explaining the
story, I find myself<n>thinking the rest of the week
is going<n>to go just fine too.
